title: SUPERDANT Christmas Scene Metal Tin Sign Retro Snowy Winter Metal Poster Wall Art Plaque Decor Rectangle Signs for Living Room Bars Restaurants Cafe Pubs Home Wall Art
features: Christmas Theme: This tin sign has a red truck with a Christmas tree by a snowy house. Merry Christmas script and vintage art add warm festive charm, fitting living rooms, porches or classic holiday spaces.
Size:The size of the red truck tin sign is 20x30cm/8x12inch, the right size to decorate wherever it looks good!

Material: The festival metal sign is made of high quality iron, which is not easy to rust and fade even in the sun and rain, so it can not only be used to decorate indoor, but also a good outdoor decoration!

Easy To Install: We have pre-drilled holes in the four corners for you, all you need to do is to fasten it to the location you want to decorate with nails, string or double sided tape, it's very easy.
Multipurpose Wall Decor: This Christmas tin sign is not only suitable for decorating your own home, bar, cafe and other places, but also as a gift for others, especially those who love vintage decor!
